title: Bangkok Dangerous
original_title: บางกอกแดนเจอรัส เพชฌฆาตเงียบ อันตราย
overview: Kong, a deaf-mute, lives a life of quiet desperation working for Bangkok mobsters. Despite his disability, Kong's mentor Joe trains him to be a stone-cold assassin. After a brutal hit abroad, Kong returns to Bangkok and falls in love with young pharmacy clerk.
